description_long: This is a large, pastel pink bungalow with a modern, open layout and multiple outdoor living spaces. The structure features a flat roof, expansive balconies, and a covered carport with a visible pink car. The front entrance is marked by a prominent portico with double doors and decorative windows above. The rear of the bungalow includes a spacious pool area with lounge chairs and a hot tub, as well as several large windows and sliding doors that open onto terraces. The building is adorned with minimalist railings, and the interior is visible through numerous large windows, revealing a contemporary, airy design.
description: A spacious, pastel pink modern bungalow with flat roofs, large balconies, a pool area, and a covered carport, featuring expansive windows and open terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a portico, double doors, and a covered carport on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport with a pink car, a hot tub on the balcony, and multiple large windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool area, lounge chairs, and extensive glass doors and windows opening onto terraces.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the pool, hot tub, and multiple balconies with minimalist railings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and large windows on all facades
